sourceAmbiguity: Test users could remain ad hoc QA notes or provider-issued credentials in chat history.
decisionTaken: Published machine-readable personas covering read-only, claim, recover-only, higher-assurance, and consent-denied paths with secret references only.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Auth tests must exercise deterministic capability, session, and recovery postures without storing raw credentials.
operationalRisk: If removed, coverage gaps and unsafe credential handling return.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add persona coverage rows without adding passwords, OTPs, raw NHS numbers, or console credentials.
